test.query: SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasPhrase(URL, 'foto video') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'news sport')
SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasPhrase(URL, 'foto video') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'news sport') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'auto moto') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'kino online')

SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasPhrase(URL, 'foto video') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'news sport') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'auto moto') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'kino online') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'mail agent') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'yandex maps') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'rambler news') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'google play')
SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasPhrase(URL, 'yandex ru') AND hasPhrase(URL, 'mail ru')
SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasPhrase(URL, 'yandex ru') AND hasPhrase(URL, 'mail ru') AND hasPhrase(URL, 'google com') AND hasPhrase(URL, 'rambler ru')
SELECT count() FROM hits_10m_single WHERE hasPhrase(URL, 'qwx', 'ngrams(3)') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'zxq', 'ngrams(3)') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'jqv', 'ngrams(3)') OR hasPhrase(URL, 'vqz', 'ngrams(3)')
